description: Risk score oscillations across 7 key sectors from 2010–2025. Vertical markers indicate documented corruption scandals — use them as orientation points when reading the waveforms.
title: EL SISMOGRAFO
subtitle: Monitoring anomalies in public procurement
footer: Each channel shows the deviation of the high-risk contract percentage from the sector's historical mean. Upward oscillations indicate periods with anomalies above average.

aria.chartLabel: Seismograph visualization of procurement risk anomalies across sectors from 2010 to 2025
